scripts.benchmark:session_search_mid: ./.ts-toolchain/node_modules/.bin/tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && OPENCLAW_PROFILE_ASSEMBLE=1 node --test --test-name-pattern="real sidecar mid-sized session search benchmark" .ts-build/test/integration/host-flow.test.js
scripts.gate:assemble_optimization: ./.ts-toolchain/node_modules/.bin/tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && OPENCLAW_PROFILE_ASSEMBLE=1 OPENCLAW_ENFORCE_ASSEMBLE_EVIDENCE_GATE=1 node --test --test-name-pattern="real sidecar mid-sized session search benchmark" .ts-build/test/integration/host-flow.test.js
scripts.probe:session_recall: ./.ts-toolchain/node_modules/.bin/tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && OPENCLAW_PROFILE_ASSEMBLE=1 node --test --test-name-pattern="real sidecar mid-sized session search benchmark" .ts-build/test/integration/host-flow.test.js
scripts.probe:session_recall_threshold: ./.ts-toolchain/node_modules/.bin/tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && OPENCLAW_PROFILE_ASSEMBLE=1 node --test --test-name-pattern="real sidecar session_recall index threshold probe" .ts-build/test/integration/host-flow.test.js
